folio.label: 107r
folio.l: For she wyl cleyme half part , al hire lyf
And if æè be syke , so god me saue
Thyne verray frendes , or a trewe knaue
Wyln kepe the bet , than she that waytetú ay
After thy good , and hatú don many a day
And if thow txketaketxake a wyf , of heye lynagetake61The word was corrected. double check the correction. It is not clear what the a is correctingODR
She shal be hauteyn , and of gret costage
Theise sentences , and an hondred thynges worse
Wrytetú this man , there god his soule curse
But take no kepe , of aÂ swicú vanyte
Diffye Theofaste , and herkene to me
A wyf is goddis ©ifte , verrayly
Alle othere manere ©iftes , hardily
As , londes , Rentes , Pasture or Comune
Or mebles , alle ben ©iftes of fortune
That passen , as a shadewe on a wal
But drede nat , if pleynly speke I shal
A wyf wol last , and in thyn hous endure
Wel lengere , than the list ¹auenture
Mariage is , a ful gret sacrament
He that hatú no wyf , I holde hi~ shent
He lyuetú helpelees , and al dissolate

note.notetxt: 77There is a cross in dry point in the left margin.ODR

folio.l: I speke of folk , in seculer estate
And herkene why , I seye nat this for nougút
That wo~man is , for ma~nes help I wrougút
The heye god , whan he had Adam maked
And saw hi~ a lone , bely naked
God of his gret goodnes , seide than
Lat vs now make , an helpe vn to this man
Lyke to hi~ self , and tha~ne he mad hi~ Eue
Here may ©e se , and heere by may ©e preeue
That wyf is ma~nes help , and his comfort
His paradise tärestre , and his disport
So buxum , and so vertuous is she
They must nedes , lyue in vnite
O flessú they ben , and oo flessú as I gesse
Hatú but on hert , in wele and in distresse
A wyf , a Seynt Mary benedicite
How mygút a man , han ony aduäsite
That hatú a wyf , certes I can nat sey
The blisse that is , be twix hem twey
There may no tonge telle , or herte thynke
If he be poore , she helpetú hi~ to swynke
She kepetú his good , and wastetú neuäe a dele
Al that hire husbonde lust , hire liketú wele
